original_statement: how many times were there at least 10,000 fans in attendance?
mutated_statement: how many times were there at least a certain number of people in attendance?
mutation_analysis: 量化信息变化 + 实体泛化: 具体数字“10,000”被替换为模糊表达“a certain number” | “fans”被泛化为更通用的“people” (10,000 fans → a certain number of people)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，猜测目标
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 关键证据来自 iteration 0 中的 chain 和 judge_thought：chain 中 simple_query 的 thought 写道“Interpreting ‘at least a certain number’ as at least 10,000…”，judge_thought 也说明“which from the table context is 10,000”。这些表述表明 agent 识别到变异问题与原问题不同并做出了解释/假设。具体表现为：没有向用户询问或表明需要澄清，而是基于表格上下文直接将模糊“a certain number”映射为具体值 10,000 并给出具体计数结果 13。因为 agent 明确意识到存在需要解释的模糊之处（使用了“interpreting”“which from the table context”之类措辞），但并未请求更多信息而是做出猜测并返回答案，故归类为“意识到目标模糊，猜测目标”。
